parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT score_date, total_score, label, temp_score, aqi_score, uv_score, humidity_score,
       temp_max, uv_index, humidity, aqi_breaches, pm25_avg, no2_avg, sea_temp,
       temp_change_vs_yesterday, trend_vs_yesterday
FROM `tfm-dataflow.analytics.health_score`
ORDER BY score_date DESC

SELECT detected_at, source, column_name, value, mean, z_score, severity, description
FROM `tfm-dataflow.analytics.anomaly_log`
ORDER BY detected_at DESC

SELECT briefing_date, briefing_text, health_score, score_label, temp_max, uv_index, humidity,
       predicted_score, predicted_label
FROM `tfm-dataflow.analytics.daily_briefing`
ORDER BY briefing_date DESC

SELECT prediction_date, for_date, predicted_temp_max, temp_trend, temp_confidence, temp_r2,
       predicted_uv_index, uv_trend, predicted_pm25, pm25_trend, predicted_health_score,
       predicted_label, tomorrow_weekday, method
FROM `tfm-dataflow.analytics.predictions`
ORDER BY for_date ASC

SELECT fetch_date, temp_max, temp_min, precipitation, windspeed_max,
  humidity_max, uv_index_max, weather_code, heat_risk, ingestion_ts
FROM `tfm-dataflow.raw_data.weather_daily`
ORDER BY fetch_date DESC

SELECT fetch_date, sea_temp_max, wave_height_max, ingestion_ts
FROM `tfm-dataflow.raw_data.marine_daily`
ORDER BY fetch_date DESC

SELECT fetch_date, pm25_avg, pm10_avg, no2_avg, o3_avg, pm25_exceeds_who, no2_exceeds_who, o3_exceeds_who, aqi_status
FROM `tfm-dataflow.raw_data.air_quality_daily`
ORDER BY fetch_date DESC
